name: T.S. Investment Corporation
summary: T.S. Investment Corporation is a private equity and venture capital firm. The firm typically invests in mergers and acquisitions and makes secondary investments. It typically invests in small and medium sized companies and venture firms. The firm also considers investments in the patents, biotechnology, medical, and fourth industrial revolution related industries. T.S. Investment Corporation was founded in 2008 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
